name: Wuxi Shangji Automation Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Shangji Automation Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of precision machine tools. It offers special processing equipment for high-hard and brittle materials and general-purpose CNC cylindrical grinders. The company's products include solar photovoltaic precision equipment, sapphire material processing equipment, and semiconductor material processing equipment; and universal CNC cylindrical grinders, such as CNC cylindrical grinders, roll grinders, and other products. Wuxi Shangji Automation Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Wuxi, China.
